debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
m : MeasurableSpace Ω
X : Ω → Set ι
u : Set ι
i j : ι
p : ↑unitInterval
P : Measure Ω
hX : @ProbabilityTheory.IsBernoulliOn ι Ω m X u p P
hi : i ∈ u
hj : j ∈ u
⊢ map (fun ω => i ∈ X ω) P = map (fun ω => j ∈ X ω) P

failed_attempts:
by
    rw [HasLaw] at hX
    simp_rw [bernoulliOn_apply'] at hX
    have h1 : (fun t => i ∈ t) = (fun p => p i) ∘ (fun t a => a ∈ t) := by ext; rfl
    have h2 : (fun t => j ∈ t) = (fun p => p j) ∘ (fun t a => a ∈ t) := by ext; rfl
    rw [← h1, ← h2, Measure.map_map, Measure.map_map]
    apply congrArg
    apply Measure.map_congr
    · ext p
      simp
    · exact hX

by
    rw [HasLaw] at hX
    simp_rw [bernoulliOn_eq_map] at hX
    rw [← hX]
    congr!
    ext s
    simp [Set.mem_setOf_eq]

by

    simp [bernoulliOn_apply', Set.preimage_setOf_eq, Function.funext_iff]
    congr! with a
    dsimp

    have h1 : (fun t ↦ i ∈ t) = (fun p ↦ p i) ∘ (fun t a ↦ a ∈ t) := by ext; rfl
    have h2 : (fun t ↦ j ∈ t) = (fun p ↦ p j) ∘ (fun t a ↦ a ∈ t) := by ext; rfl
